title: About Me
content: I am currently an PhD student (direct doctorate programme) at ETH Zürich. My research interests: Integrated Circuits Design and Its Automation, Silicon Photonics. My Portrait EducationDirect Doctorate Student in Electrical EngineeringEidgenössische Technische Hochschule Zürich (ETH Zürich), 2025.9 - 2031.7 (estimated)IDEAS group, Integrated Systems Laboratory, D-ITET, ETH ZürichAdvisor: Prof. Dr. Hua Wang BSc in Electronic Information EngineeringUniversity of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2021.8 - 2025.6Accumulative GPA: 3.98/4.00 (Ranking 1/20)Major GPA: 3.99/4.00 Special Student Program (Non-Degree) at EECSMassachussets Institute of Technology (MIT), 2024.2 - 2024.5Undergraduate Culmulative GPA: 5.0/5.0 PublicationsChenhao Chu, Yuqi Liu, Yizhou Xu, Shouqing Fu, Takuma Torii, Shintaro Shinjo, Konstantinos Manetakis, Andreas Burg and Hua Wang, Top-Metal-Only RFIC Retargeting for Fast Specs-to-Silicon Iteration Enabled by AI-Assisted Inverse Design, IEEE RFIC 2026, Boston, Massachusetts. Ruogu Deng†, Erse Jia†, Yizhou Xu, Han Liu, Jun Li, Jingbo Wang, Bolun Cui, Guike Li, Jian Liu, Zhao Zhang, Haiwen Cai, Wei Chu, Fenghe Yang, Nan Qi, and Liyuan Liu, A 336Gb/s/lane 2.47pJ/b Integrated Transmitter with Silicon Photonic TW-MZM and BW-Boost High-Linearity Driver, IEEE/Optica OFC 2026, Los Angeles, California. Houbo He†, Yizhou Xu†, Lei Xia, Yaolong Hu, Fan Cai, Taiyun Chi, MOTIF-RF: Multi-template On-chip Transformer Synthesis Incorporating Frequency-domain Self-transfer Learning for RFIC Design Automation, ACM/IEEE ASP-DAC 2026 (Accepted), Hong Kong. View on IEEE Sikai Chen, Nan Qi, Jie Peng, Haoran Yin, Menghan Yang, Minye Zhu, Yizhou Xu, Ruogu Deng, Guike Li, Yujun Xie, Mo Guang, Kaiwen Long, Jian Liu, Nanjian Wu, Zheyu Fang, Ming Li, Liyuan Liu, A 3D-Integrated, 4λ×128Gb/s WDM Si-Photonic Receiver for Chiplet Optical I/O, IEEE ESSERC 2025, Munich, Germany. View on IEEE Yizhou Xu, Ruogu Deng, Jingbo Wang, Han Liu, Zhihan Zhang, Yihao Yang, Guike Li, Binhao Wang, Nan Qi, Liyuan Liu, A 64-GBaud 64-QAM Optical Coherent Transmitter with Monolithically Integrated Driver and I/Q Modulator in 45-nm SOI CMOS, IEEE ICTA 2024, Hangzhou, China. View on IEEE Chip Gallery Chip Image Description 4Ch 200+G/Ch Differential Distributed MZM Driver Tech: GF SiGe 90nm BiCMOS Area: 3mm*1.1mm Tape-out Date: December 2024 Usage: 4Ch 224Gbit/s PAM-4 MZM Driver w/ CTLE & VGA 1Ch 200+G/Ch Differential Distributed MZM Driver Tech: GF SiGe 90nm BiCMOS Area: 1.15mm*1mm Tape-out Date: June 2024 Usage: 1Ch 224Gbit/s PAM-4 MZM Driver w/ CTLE Operational Amplifier (MIT 6.2080 Course Tape-out) Tech: Intel 16 FinFET Area: 0.1mm*0.1mm (without padring) Tape-out Date: May 2024 Usage: Digitally Controlled OPAMP Academic ExperiencesAI-assisted RFIC DesignRice University, 2024.7 - 2025.7Supervisor: Dr. Taiyun ChiDeveloping new electro-magnetic & circuitry inverse design flow for radio-frequency integrated circuits (RFIC) with the assistance of artificial neural networks (ANN) and general machine learning (ML) methods. Targeting automatic end-to-end synthesis of an RF transceiver system. One conference paper in submission. Wideband Power Amplifier Design for mm-Wave ApplicationMassachussets Institute of Technology, 2024.2 - 2024.6Supervisor: Dr. Ruonan HanAn undergraduate research project. Theoretical analysis and simulation for a high power-back-off (PBO) and ultra-wideband (up to 115% FBW) distributed Doherty-like power amplifier (DDPA) design for mm-wave application (designed with Intel 16 FinFET process).Some low-frequency circuit modules (digitally controlled operational amplifier) schematic and layout design with Intel 16 FinFET process. The 0.01mm2 chip is taped out in May 2024. Ultra-wideband Optical Communication Driver Circuit DesignInstitute of Semiconductors, Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.12 - 2025.8Supervisor: Dr. Nan QiUltra-wideband differential distributed (travelling-wave) amplifier (DDA) design for optical modulator driver (e.g., MRM / MZM / VCSEL) targeting 224Gb/s channel speed with GlobalFoundries 90nm SiGe process. Responsible for a 1.2mm2 chip which is taped out in June 2024. A four-channel variation is currently under design and estimated to be taped out in December 2024.Supported by: Beijing Natural Science Foundation Monolithically Integrated Optical Coherent Transmitter DesignInstitute of Semiconductors, Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2024.5 - 2024.8Supervisor: Dr. Nan QiMonolithically integrated CMOS mixed-signal driver circuits, Mach-Zehnder modulator (MZM) and electrical-optical interconnection design with GlobalFoundries 45nm SiPh CMOS SOI process. Completed silicon-photonic co-design and co-simulation process in Cadence SiPh platform. A simulation-based first-author paper has been published on IEEE ICTA 2024 from this project.Supported by: Beijing Natural Science Foundation HonorsDec 2025: IEEE SSCS Code-A-Chip Travel Grant AwardJune 2025: Outstanding Graduate of BeijingNov 2024: National Scholarship (Top 1%)Sep 2024: UCAS Overseas Graduate Studies Fellowship (Top 0.5%)Oct 2023: National Scholarship (Top 1%)Feb 2023: Mathematical Contest In Modeling, Finalist (Top 3%)Nov 2022: China Collegiate Programming Contest, Guangzhou Site, Gold MedalNov 2021: The 46th ICPC Asia Regional Contest Jinan, Gold Medal Extracurricular ActivitiesTeaching Assistant: Non-linear Electronic Circuits at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2024.8 - 2025.1Teaching EDA tools like ADS for RF design at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences. Student Coach of Algorithm Association at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.7 - 2024.7Organized weekly, winter and summer training sessions.Established an Online-Judge System at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences. SkillsSoftware: Analog IC Design toolchains (Cadence Virtuoso, Mentor Calibre, etc.), EM simulation tools (PeakView, EMX, Ansys HFSS), Digital IC Design toolchains (AMD Vivado, Cadence Innovus), RF Design toolchains (Keysight ADS), PCB Design tools (Cadence Allergo, Altium Designer) Programming Language: C/C++, C#, Python, MATLAB, Mathematica/Wolfram, Cadence SKILL, Verilog, Verilog-a ContactUniversity Email Address: yizhxu [at] iis [dot] ee [dot] ethz [dot] ch Personal Email Address: chn_xuyizhou [at] outlook [dot] comGitHub Repository: EgoGreenalCodeForces Account: X_o_rCodeChef Account: X_o_r3
